title: The Ambient Wild
lines: Hidden speakers in the trees, long-abandoned by their human operators, continue to broadcast a distorted loop of jungle sounds.
The chirps of birds and the roars of predators are layered with the digital crackle of a dying terminal. It is a haunting, synthesized orchestra of a world that no longer exists.
The paths ahead fork into deep shadow. One leads toward the scent of ozone and heat, the other toward a cool, blue light.

options.desc: 1. Follow the scent of ozone and heat (To the Lion)
2. Follow the cool, blue light (To the Capybaras)
